test case id: tc-datarequest-001 title: verify data request process module: data retrieval source pages: 3,4,5 preconditions: api_manager is initialized test data: list of json data test steps: 1. call request(listjson) method in main 2. check if listjson is requested from api_manager 3. check if api_manager passes the request to service/need/report 4. check if service/need/report processes the request 5. check if api_manager returns the result to main 6. check if main displays the list expected result: main should display the processed list.
